anti_claim: This Batch-8 structural_theses fixture accepts exact copied macro-source digest evidence, public synthetic structural-thesis exercises, and stable negative-case codes only. It does not authorize financial advice, investment recommendations, live market data, provider dispatch, portfolio action, publication, or release.

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Financial advice, investment recommendation, live market-data validation, provider dispatch, portfolio action, publication approval, release approval, or fixture-only source pointers without copied body evidence.
failure_modes: copied structural_theses.py body drifts from source
loser evidence is dropped from the family
negative control leaks into confirmed-claim state
forward gate admits a refuted pattern
receipts include source bodies, provider payloads, or private runtime state
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe exact-source runtime exercise of the structural_theses CP1/CP2 family builder and validator.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader rerun the structural-thesis winner, loser, and negative-control guardrails without live data, provider calls, portfolio state, or publication authority.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: build a public fixture family with winners, loser, and negative control
require loser evidence to flow through as valid evidence
require negative control to stay outside confirmed-claim state
reject survivor-only, forward-gate-breach, and control-leak cases
keep financial advice, investment recommendation, live market data, provider calls, portfolio action, publication, and release authority false

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 8 Structural Theses capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 8 Structural Theses capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch8_structural_theses_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: This Batch-8 structural_theses fixture accepts exact copied macro-source digest evidence, public synthetic structural-thesis exercises, and stable negative-case codes only. It does not authorize financial advice, investment recommendations, live market data, provider dispatch, portfolio action, publication, or release.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, and public_private_boundary.
